struct BatchProcessor {
    buffer: Vec<Record>,
}

impl BatchProcessor {
    fn new() -> Self {
        Self { buffer: Vec::new() }
    }

    fn process_batch(&mut self, records: Vec<Record>) {
        // BAD: buffer spikes to large capacity and never shrinks
        self.buffer.extend(records);
        // ... process buffer ...
        self.buffer.clear();
        // capacity remains at high-water mark
    }
}

struct Record {
    data: Vec<u8>,
}
